content.rendered:
• 80+ verified 5 star reviews

/ video production

Increase Awareness & Connect With Your Audience

Using video content on platforms such as YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and Facebook Reels helps with SEO efforts and boosts brand awareness. It also promotes higher engagement rates, drives more traffic, and promotes retargeting efforts while building your brand’s credibility.

Book Strategy Call ➜
Book Strategy Call ➜
/ videos we produce

Find the right video style to match your marketing goals.

Product & Service Videos

These are marketing content videos that are sponsored or created by a brand that shares the brand’s values and does not directly advertise or promote the brand.

TV Commercials

TV Commercials advertise your company, service, or product and are produced for television.

Brand Awareness Videos

The commercial videos that can be made for Television (TVC’s), YouTube, and various social media platforms about your business’s vision, mission, or products and services.

Testimonial Videos

These feature your customers talking about their experience with your company, the product, or service.

Event Videos

Event Videos can range from corporate-sponsored events to large trade shows, annual events, or even music festivals.

Social Media Videos

Social Media videos can help you bring your social media channels to life and increase engagement with informative, insightful video content.

Marketing Ad Campaigns

These are promotional videos that rely on an audience to generate the message of a product or service.

Recruitment Videos

These communicate who you are and what your company stands for so that potential employees can discover the look and feel of your company in a short space of time.

Product Review Videos

A product video effectively highlights the benefits of a product or service.

Case Studies

These are about real customer success stories and case studies present the problem and then how your company provided solutions.

Investment Pitches

Your idea is brilliant—give it the presentation it deserves. Spark interest among investors with a high-quality video to tell your story.

Aerial Videos

Drone aerial videos allow you to capture professional stabilized  footage from a unique point-of-view in full HD quality

Tabletop Videos

Tabletop videos that we use for commercials especially with food products on a a tabletop and make make use of simple sets.

Animated Videos

These videos can transform your static visuals into engaging showstoppers. We can work with your existing assets or make something from scratch.

PSA Videos

These videos are educational or informational, generally made to raise the audience's awareness on issues of public interest.

Free Consultation

Book Strategy Call ➜

Free Consultation

Book Strategy Call ➜
/ Shoot, Edit, Share

Our video production features

Pre-Production

  • Scriptwriting
  • Story Boarding
  • Budgeting
  • Location Scouting
  • Production Scheduling
  • Talent / Actors Acquisition

Production

  • Single-Camera
  • Multi-Camera
  • 4K Cinema Packages
  • Aerial Drone Footage
  • Makeup Artist & Stylist
  • Professional Lighting Equipment

Post-Production

  • Video Editing
  • Motion Graphics
  • Sound Design & Voiceovers
  • Color Correction
  • Video Marketing Strategy
  • Video Distribution

/ some of our work

Videos We Have Produced.

/ video marketing

Videos that increase ROI

Our work extends beyond just producing high-quality video content. We can help you market it to your target audience, using paid advertising, such as Google Ads, Microsoft Ads, TikTok, or Meta Advertising.

Learn More ➜
Learn More ➜

Ready to discuss your video production project?

Book Strategy Call ➜
Book Strategy Call ➜
/ FAQ's

Have questions? We can help.

Have questions?
We can help.

How much does a video cost?

The cost of a video depends on a number of factors, including the length of the video, the number of locations, the number of days of shooting, and any special effects or animation that is needed.

Contact us today and we can talk through your options before providing a detailed proposal and cost breakdown.

How long does it take to produce a video?

Again, this depends on a number of factors. A simple testimonial video can be produced in just a few days, while a more complex video project can take several weeks or even months.

Contact us today, and we’ll give you an estimate for your specific project.

What if I'm not happy with the final video?

Our video agency works closely with our clients throughout the production process to ensure they are happy with the footage we are capturing. We also provide a rough cut of the video for approval before moving into post-production.

However, if you’re not happy with the final video, we will make revisions until you are satisfied.

Contact us today to learn more about our video production services or to get a free quote. We look forward to working with you!

Related services

  • Content Marketing

Branded visuals and video content. Get tailor-made content that is built to perform.

  • Paid Search Advertising

The most cost-effective and scalable way to connect your business with prospective customers.
